name: @para/decimal
description: Self-contained exact-decimal arithmetic for Para. Backs the `0.1d` numeric-literal suffix — `0.1d` lowers to `__paraDec("0.1")`, and the resulting Decimal value composes via `.plus` / `.minus` / `.times` / `.dividedBy` / `.eq` / `.lt` etc. Internal repr is `{ coef: bigint, exp: number }`, so every operation that doesn't divide is exact. NOT YET RELEASED — private:true / 0.0.0-dev pending the workspace split.
